blocker_classes.operator_intent: Stop autonomous execution immediately and require scope correction.
blocker_classes.rationale: Out-of-scope mutations violate declared policy boundaries and cannot continue safely.

blocker_classes.operator_intent: Block any external side effect until explicit approval token exists.
blocker_classes.rationale: Unapproved writes/notifications/deploy actions are irreversible and need explicit operator intent.

blocker_classes.operator_intent: Escalate for manual evidence triage before allowing resume.
blocker_classes.rationale: Missing or corrupted evidence removes reproducibility, so trust must be restored by an operator.

blocker_classes.operator_intent: Require operator review and guard completion before continuation.
blocker_classes.rationale: High-impact surfaces need predefined guardrails to avoid silent policy regressions.
